summary:
Failed (routing_404): TEST FAILURE

Clicking 'Proses Pengembalian' did not display the return-processing form or a success message — the app navigated to a 404 page instead.

Observations:

- The current URL is /peminjaman/kembali/194b74c1-379f-418e-a079-b83180432f03 indicating the return route is missing or broken
